name: ship
description: Delivery loop for Claude Code. The /ship skill takes a green change out the door — verify → feature branch → rebase (re-running Layer 1 when the base moved) → /code-review → push → PR → watch — and an opt-in Stop-hook gate refuses to call a task done while delivery is incomplete (dirty tree, stranded on a protected branch, unpushed, PR red/conflicted, or unreviewed). Delivery only; never runs your lint/tests — that is feedback-loops' job.
